SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-15: How China and U.S. eased the Middle East oil shock and kept prices from spiking even higher: China and the U.S., the world's two largest economies, wield great influence over the oil market and are using it to help plug the supply gap. . 2026-05-15: Trump went big on tech stocks in first quarter of 2026, new filings show: Trump bought shares of Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Motorola and Dell worth millions, new ethics disclosure filings show.. 2026-05-15: What you need to know about Nvidia competitor Cerebras after wild IPO: Nvidia competitor Cerebras made a stunning debut on Wall Street Thursday, signaling unstoppable demand for AI chips. Here's how its chips compete with Nvidia's.. 2026-05-15: Trump touted Palantir on Truth Social after buying the company's stock, records show: During the first three months of the year, Trump purchased between $630,000 and $247,008 worth of Palantir stock and sold at least $1.1 million.. 2026-05-15: Wall Street and Main Street face off next week with Nvidia, consumer earnings. Here's what's ahead : Stocks have been ripping higher thanks to a revival in enthusiasm around artificial intelligence, but without much follow through in other parts of the market. . 2026-05-15: Dow loses more than 500 points Friday as tech slumps and yields spike: Live updates: Wall Street is coming off yet another positive session, with both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite closing at record highs. . 2026-05-15: Traders now see next Fed interest rate move as a hike following inflation surge: The fed funds futures market is pricing in an increase as soon as December.. 2026-05-15: Democrats blast Trump over 'slush fund' in possible IRS lawsuit settlement: ABC News reported President Donald Trump could settle a lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for a $1.7 billion fund to compensate his allies.. 2026-05-15: Stephen Miran exits the Fed.
